pageIntents.what_for: Educational, long-form content designed to rank on Google. Examples: guides, how-to articles, pillar pages.
Showcases what you sell or offer. Examples: product pages, feature pages, pricing pages.
Tries to capture email or contact info. Examples: landing pages, webinars, free downloads.
Pushes for purchase or sign-up. Examples: checkout pages, sales pages, order forms.
About the company and trust building. Examples: about us, homepage, press, careers.
Demonstrates results and impact. Examples: outcome reports, case studies, success stories.
Introduces a brand or problem to attract new cold traffic. Examples: viral content, infographics, awareness blogs.
